note: seq=75 (READ-ONLY field-fill audit). Exact per-field fill counts/% across atlas.business + field_provenance, done-vs-usable-email-vs-usable-phone split, 3 fat + 2 thin real sample records, measured Apollo/ZoomInfo completeness %. NO writes. Non-blocking. Publishes status/hetzner/field-audit.json.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_field_audit.py':'4577693ed8d20b1dcdda5fe6ddd1e9d0e0193d3d8598aca6953861f9708d02cc'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS field-fill audit (read-only)
After=network-online.target postgresql.service

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=15
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_field_audit.py
TimeoutStartSec=10min

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import os; keys=['STATUS_TOKEN','STATUS_REPO','STATUS_API_BASE','STATUS_BRANCH','NODE_ID']; open('/etc/atlas/audit.env','w').write(chr(10).join('%s=%s'%(k,os.environ[k]) for k in keys if os.environ.get(k))+chr(10)); os.chmod('/etc/atlas/audit.env',0o600); import subprocess as s; s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-field-audit.service']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-field-audit.service']); print('field audit kicked')"
